title: Upload judgments online the day they are pronounced: Bombay High Court to judicial officers
description: The Bombay High Court has directed all judicial officers in Maharashtra and Goa to ensure that orders and judgments passed by them are uploaded on the CIS server on the same day.If an order or judgment is not uploaded on the same day, the officer must furnish details and reasons for the delay. Failure to upload orders or judgments within the stipulated time will amount to “misconduct touching to the integrity of judicial officer”.Judicial officers have also been asked to submit a monthly ce
